Ballet Cycle »Variety«

Ticket information

Whether multi-part or narrative ballet - the art form of dance invites a wide variety of explorations and forms of performance. Immerse yourself in the wonderful diversity of ballet!

All dates of this cycle

Ö1 U27
Cycle »Verdi«

Ticket information

Central works by the Italian composer Giuseppe Verdi united in one cycle. You will gain a comprehensive insight into the composer's musical oeuvre and his timeless significance for the world of opera.

All dates of this cycle

More about cycles

Cycle »Chamber Music«

Ticket information

On ten Saturdays, members of the Vienna Philharmonic present selected chamber music programs in the Gustav Mahler Hall.

All dates of this cycle

More about cycles

Richard Wagner

Der fliegende Holländer

U27
Cycle »Tales & Myths«

Ticket information

In this cycle, we tell you about the blind Iolanta, who becomes sighted through love and faith, take you into the spectacularly thrilling world of our new Magic Flute, introduce you to a cursed sailor who hopes for redemption and embark on adventurous journeys into antiquity with the lovers Kallirhoe and Chaireas.

All dates of this cycle

More about cycles

Cycle »To Begin With«

Ticket information

Certain works enjoy worldwide popularity due to their captivating storylines, their ingenious music or the recognition value of catchy melodies. These pieces appeal to opera professionals, but are also particularly suitable for those who are at the beginning of their journey through the infinite cosmos of opera.

All dates of this cycle

More about cycles

Cycle »Grand Voices«

Ticket information

In the now-established solo concerts, you can experience some of the world’s leading singers not in opera productions, but in specially curated programs of songs and arias.

All Dates of this Cycle
